name: alexa-squeezebox-lambda
description: Alexa Skill Lambda – controls LMS playback via the AlexaBridge plugin

scripts.package: npm run clean && npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path lambda.zip) { Remove-Item lambda.zip -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path dist,node_modules -DestinationPath lambda.zip"
scripts.deploy: npm run package && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name alexa-squeezebox --zip-file fileb://lambda.zip --region eu-west-1
